function.name: volume_up
function.description: Increase the robot's speaking volume to help the user hear more clearly. Use if the user seems to have difficulty hearing or requests louder speech.

amount.description: Amount to increase the volume by

function.name: volume_down
function.description: Lower the robot's speaking volume to make the interaction more comfortable. Use if the user seems sensitive to loud sounds or requests a softer voice.

amount.description: Amount to decrease the volume by

function.name: get_current_weather
function.description: Retrieve the current weather at the user's location. Useful for making relevant suggestions (e.g., going for a walk or attending an outdoor event).

function.name: get_local_forecast
function.description: Get the weather forecast for a specific day near the user's location. Use to plan or suggest upcoming outdoor activities.

relative_day.description: The day for which to get the forecast (-2 = 2 days ago, -1 = yesterday, 0 = today, 1 = tomorrow, until relative day 7.)

function.name: get_perceived_objects
function.description: Retrieve a list of objects currently perceived by the robot. Use this to refer to items in the user's environment to support context-aware conversation.

function.name: get_date_and_time
function.description: Get the current date and time. Always call this before suggesting activities to ensure contextual relevance.

function.name: get_activity_data
function.description: Access the user's physical activity data for a previous day. Useful for giving personalized encouragement or suggesting appropriate exercises based on recent effort.

relative_day.description: How many previous days to get the activity data (1 = one day ago, 2 = two days ago, etc.)

function.name: get_activity_schedule
function.description: Retrieve scheduled activities based on the user's interests for a specific day of the week (e.g., 'Lundi', 'Mardi', etc.). Ensure you get the current day and time using get_date_and_time before calling. Make sure it is not too late for the suggested activity. Only suggest activities that match the user's interests.

relative_day.description: Get activity schedule for the day of the week. (Lundi, Mardi, Mercredi, Jeudi, Vendredi, Samedi, Dimanche)
